task_completion.description: Navigate to the DHIS2 User Management application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the DHIS2 dashboard with the 'Users' or 'User Management' app opened, displaying the user list or user creation screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct user profile details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user creation form is filled with Username 'fatmata.koroma', First name 'Fatmata', Surname 'Koroma', and Email 'fatmata.koroma@mohsl.gov.sl' (or 'mohs.gov.sl').

task_completion.description: Assign an appropriate data entry user role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'User roles' or 'Available roles' section of the form, a role related to 'Data entry' is selected and moved to the allocated/assigned roles column.

task_completion.description: Set the data capture organisation unit to Kenema district.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Data capture organisation units' tree section, the node for 'Kenema district' is explicitly checked or highlighted.

task_completion.description: Set the data view/output organisation unit to Sierra Leone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Data output and analytic organisation units' (or Data view) tree section, the top-level node for 'Sierra Leone' is explicitly checked or highlighted.

task_completion.description: Save the user and verify the account is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification indicating the user was saved, or the user 'Fatmata Koroma' ('fatmata.koroma') is visible in the active users list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual DHIS2 web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the DHIS2 interface at localhost:8080, rather than terminal commands (like cURL) or automated scripts in an IDE.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The user details and configurations are entered into the actual DHIS2 form fields, not a notepad or text document.

integrity.description: The organisation unit trees were genuinely interacted with.
integrity.visual_evidence: The org unit tree shows expanded nodes and standard DHIS2 checkbox selections, not just text typed into a search bar without making a selection.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Fatmata Koroma is a real person in Sierra Leone's health sector, and Kenema district is a real administrative unit in Sierra Leone. Note: The task description contains a typo in the email domain ('mohsl.gov.sl' instead of the official 'mohs.gov.sl'). You should accept either domain in the email field. The task focuses on DHIS2 user administration, specifically creating an active account, assigning a data entry role, and configuring data capture (Kenema district) and data view (Sierra Leone) organisation units.
